description: Plugin-distributed hooks for customer-support-cx-operations. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags CX operations anti-patterns (SLA without staffing basis, CSAT/CES conflation, macro PII or wall language, AI deflection with no handoff). Set CX_OPS_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
